Publication date: Available online 24 June 2026

Source: The Lancet

Author(s): Yanhui Dong, Jia Wei, Bo Xi, Yifei Hu, Yuan Lin, Xiaoyu Li, Helena Hui Wang, Sabine Kleinert, Susan M Sawyer, Zhibin Hu, Yi Song

item.title: How middle powers can strengthen global health governance: the case of South Korea
item.description:
Publication date: Available online 22 June 2026

Source: The Lancet

Author(s): Suerie Moon, Sinhye Ha, Jerome Kim, Soonman Kwon, Hoon-Sang Lee, Sue Park, Minah Kang

item.title: Pakistan and Afghanistan: a call for health diplomacy and restraint
item.description:
Publication date: Available online 19 June 2026

Source: The Lancet

Author(s): Zulfiqar A Bhutta, Fawad Akbari, Shabina Raza, Suraya Dalil
